overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in western attire walking alongside a horse through a foggy mountain trail at night. The character carries a lantern that illuminates the immediate path ahead as they navigate from a narrow rocky corridor onto open grassy hillsides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain corridor with cliff walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow mountain path while leading the horse, holding a lantern that illuminates the ground ahead

notable_agents.action: horse walking alongside the character, following the path through the rocky corridor

entered.detail: tall rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow mountain path
rocky cliff face on the right side of the path, partially obscured by fog
narrow dirt trail winding through the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, foggy mountain corridor flanked by rocky cliff walls on both sides. The lantern casts a warm glow on the dirt path immediately ahead while the horse follows closely on the right. The sky is mostly obscured by the surrounding rock formations and mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with scattered rock formations

events.description: exits narrow rocky corridor into open grassy hillside as the cliff walls recede

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it opens up into a wider landscape, maintaining steady pace with the horse

notable_agents.action: horse trotting alongside on the grassy path, occasionally looking around

entered.detail: open grass-covered slopes extending into the foggy distance
rolling grassy terrain rising on the right side of the path
prominent boulder outcrop visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path emerges from the narrow corridor into a wide-open grassy hillside. The rocky walls fall away to reveal rolling terrain in all directions, though visibility remains limited by fog. Large rock formations dot the landscape as the character and horse continue along the winding dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain path with scattered trees and shrubs

events.description: vegetation becomes denser with scattered trees and bushes appearing along the path

agents.ego_description: navigating the path as it curves through increasingly vegetated terrain, maintaining steady movement uphill

notable_agents.action: horse walking closely beside the character, moving through the grassy terrain

entered.detail: sparse trees appearing along the right side of the path, silhouetted against the fog
low shrubs and undergrowth lining the edge of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a grassy landscape that becomes increasingly vegetated with scattered trees and bushes. The fog persists, creating a moody atmosphere as the character and horse move through the terrain. The path remains clearly defined, winding through the natural obstacles as they progress deeper into the mountainous area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic mountain corridor into an expansive, fog-shrouded highland. It begins with the character and horse navigating a narrow dirt path flanked by towering rocky cliff walls, where a handheld lantern provides the primary source of warm light against the mist. As the path emerges from the corridor, the rocky walls fall away to reveal a wide-open grassy hillside dotted with large stone formations. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes increasingly vegetated with scattered trees and bushes, while the winding trail leads the pair deeper into the moody, mountainous landscape.
